name: Jotaro Kujo
description:
“Love hits the Joestar men hard... but only once in a lifetime.”

_

Honestly… that is one of the most beautiful and one of the saddest things I’ve seen Araki write ‘cause then I think of Joseph and Caesar or Jonathan and Erina 😭

But anyways, enjoy~

Thank you for >30K!!
